name: Fish Mcnuggetts
recipeInstructions: Preheat oil to 350°F. In a medium bowl, beat egg, milk, salt, and pepper together. In another medium bowl, combine all dry ingredients. Dip nuggets into drench mix, then coat well in dredge. Carefully place a few nuggets at a time into hot oil. Fry until golden brown and cooked through, about 2 minutes. Use an electric fryer with a basket for best results. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately with tartar or cocktail sauce.
